subject: Angular UI App to Tosca Control Loop
commit_message:
Angular UI App to Tosca Control Loop

This commit includes the Angular UI App which is a monitoring app for the Control Loop Instances

The Angular UI App here is being converted into a React application, which will be submitted in a future review on the policy-gui master branch

This is the last review on the tosca-poc branch. It archives the Angular GUI built for the Control Loop TOSCA PoC

Issue-ID: POLICY-3214
Signed-off-by: brunomilitzer <bruno.militzer@est.tech>
Change-Id: I436405cd50018875bf79d099f1c8675faf5d8c50

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Patch Set 1:

since this is all new code being added, and not simple updates to existing code, can we break it into four chunks and review each chunk individually?

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> since this is all new code being added, and not simple updates to existing code, can we break it into four chunks and review each chunk individually?

We are re-implementing this GUI in React in Istanbul, so we raised this change to archive what we did in the PoC in case someone wants to check it out and re-run the PoC. We won't re-use this code in Istanbul so we raised this review to archive the code.

Maybe we should just leave the code and not check it in at all?

Abandoned

The code is available in https://wiki.onap.org/pages/viewpage.action?pageId=100895810#ParticipantFullPipelinePMSHDeploymentDemoHowtorun...-SetupandStarttheAngularUI
